key_finding: Lower value_hat = more cancer cell killing. Confirmed by negative Spearman correlation: target gene overexpression predicts lower value_hat (= higher drug sensitivity), consistent with pharmacogenomic expectations.

validations.interpretation: High EGFR → lower erlotinib value_hat (r=-0.148, p=3.03e-04): model correctly captures oncogene-driven sensitivity
High MAP2K1 → lower trametinib value_hat (r=-0.211, p=3.74e-06): model correctly captures oncogene-driven sensitivity
